perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with a cap and glasses is talking directly to the camera in a room, gesturing with his hands. (2) Scenes transition to a digital rendering of smart glasses (Aria Gen 2) showing their internal components. (3) On-screen demonstrations of eye-tracking and hand-tracking technology using a laptop and POV footage from an office. (4) Footage of a person's POV in a grocery store looking at onions, followed by a heart rate monitor UI overlay. (5) The man reappears on screen, demonstrating the foldable temples of the glasses and concluding the segment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts. An energetic male voice speaks in Mandarin throughout the video. (2) Sharp sound effects (dinging/sparkling sounds) emphasize product feature highlights. (3) The music remains consistent in volume, while the vocal narration is the primary focus with a professional and enthusiastic tone. (4) No significant ambient noise; the recording environment sounds like a controlled studio.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Chinese translating the speaker's dialogue. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'Aria Gen 2 智慧眼鏡' (Smart Glasses) appearing with a sparkle effect. (3) Feature Labels: '眼動追蹤系統' (Eye tracking system), 'CV camera', '3D 手部還有物體追蹤' (3D hand and object tracking), '支援心率的監測' (Supports heart rate monitoring). (4) Social Media Handles: '3c有意思tim哥' (Facebook) and '@3ctim' (Instagram) at the top left.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Feature Breakdown -> Use Case Demos -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 female passer-by in office demo, 1 male hand in POV grocery demo
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a dark green cap, clear-framed glasses, and a grey t-shirt with a 'CANADA ROOTS 1973' logo.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A blurred residential room background for the speaker; an open-plan office with bookshelves and a produce section of a grocery store in the demo clips.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To introduce and promote the technical specifications and user experience of Meta's Aria Gen 2 smart glasses, focusing on advanced features like eye-tracking, 3D hand-tracking, and health monitoring.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The presence of the 'miko' logo throughout and the detailed positive breakdown of the Meta product features.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced narration, multi-layered text overlays, and '3c有意思tim哥' brand watermarking.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses high-quality product renders and POV software interface clips to build credibility for the tech review.
